settings.title: Settings
aiConfig.title: AI Configuration
aiConfig.subtitle: Manage global preferences, system instructions, and third-party provider credentials.
aiConfig.toolPredictorDesc: Select a lightweight model to predict which tools are needed for each chat request. This reduces context size and improves response quality.
aiConfig.noRouterFound: No smart tool router models found
aiConfig.instructionsPlaceholder: You are a helpful AI assistant designed to assist developers...
aiConfig.instructionsHint: These instructions are injected into the context window for every new session. Individual agents may override this behavior.
aiConfig.providerSubtitle: Connect a new AI model provider to your workspace.
aiConfig.modelAvailabilitySubtitle: Fetch and whitelist models for this provider.
aiConfig.manualModelPlaceholder: Enter model ID manually (e.g., gpt-4-turbo, claude-3-sonnet)
aiConfig.providerChangesNote: Changes to provider configurations apply immediately to new sessions.
aiConfig.validation.fillRequired: Please fill in Provider Name, Base URL, and API Key
aiConfig.validation.selectModel: Please select at least one model
aiConfig.confirmDeleteProvider: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
aiConfig.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?
aiConfig.testConnection: Test API connection and fetch models
aiConfig.testConnectionNoUrl: API Base URL is required to test
memory.title: Memory System
memory.subtitle: Configure how Clara remembers and recalls information from your conversations
memory.enableDesc: Allow Clara to remember information from your conversations and use it in future chats
memory.privacyNotice: All memories are encrypted with your user-specific key. Not even ClaraVerse administrators can access your memories.
memory.clearFailed: Failed to clear all memories. Please try again.
memory.extractionFreqDesc: How many messages before extracting new memories
memory.extractionFreqDefault: Default: 20 messages (conservative to save credits). Lower values extract more frequently but use more credits. Range: 2-50 messages.
memory.contextLimitDesc: Maximum memories to inject into each conversation
memory.recommended: Recommended: 5 memories. Only the most relevant memories based on your current conversation are selected.
memory.extractionDetail: After every {{count}} messages, Clara automatically extracts important information (preferences, facts, context).
memory.selectionDetail: Relevant memories are automatically selected and injected into your conversation context.
memory.decayDetail: Memories are scored based on recency, frequency, and importance. Stale memories are automatically archived.
memory.privacyDetail: All memories are encrypted with AES-256-GCM using your unique key. Only you can decrypt them.
memory.disabledDesc: Enable it above to let Clara remember and learn from your conversations
memory.clearConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete all {{count}} memories (including archived ones). This action cannot be undone.
memory.clearWarning: Clara will lose all learned information about your preferences, projects, and context. You'll start fresh.
usage.title: Plan usage limits
usage.subtitle: Monitor your current usage across different resource limits.
usage.memoryDesc: Memory system stores encrypted information from your conversations. Average score: {{score}}
usage.memoriesExtracted: Memories will be extracted as you chat with Clara
usage.howItWorksDesc: Clara automatically extracts and stores key information from your conversations. Relevant memories are injected into future chats to provide context and continuity.
usage.extractionDesc: Memories are extracted after every N messages (configurable: 2-50, default: 20)
usage.categories: Categories: personal info, preferences, context, facts, instructions
usage.selectionDesc: Before each chat, the most relevant memories are automatically selected and injected into the context.
usage.decayDesc: Memories are scored based on recency, frequency of use, and conversation engagement.
usage.archivedNote: Memories with score < 0.15 are archived but can be restored
usage.encrypted: End-to-end encrypted with AES-256-GCM using your unique encryption key
usage.noAdminAccess: ClaraVerse administrators cannot access your encrypted memories
usage.deduplication: Automatic deduplication prevents storing duplicate information
usage.creditUsageDesc: Memory extraction uses AI credits. The default threshold (20 messages) is optimized to balance memory quality with credit conservation.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Control how your data is stored and manage your privacy preferences.
privacy.chooseStorage: Choose how you'd like to store your conversations.
privacy.thisDeviceDesc: Your chats stay private on this device.
privacy.deviceWarning: Stored in browser. Others with device access can view. Clara has no access.
privacy.syncDevicesDesc: Access your chats from any device.
devices.title: Connected Devices
devices.description: Manage CLI and API devices connected to your account.
devices.noDevicesDesc: Use the MCP CLI to connect a device to your account.
devices.footerNote: Revoking a device will immediately disconnect it and require re-authentication.
devices.confirmRevokeCurrent: This will log you out of this device. Are you sure?
channels.title: Communication Channels
channels.description: Connect external messaging platforms to chat with ClaraVerse AI. Each channel creates a secure webhook endpoint for real-time communication.
channels.securityDesc: When you connect a bot, anyone who messages it will use your API credits, tools, and integrations. To protect your account, add your Telegram username or user ID to the Access Control list after connecting.
channels.securityTipDesc: To find your Telegram user ID, message @userinfobot on Telegram.
channels.pollingDesc: Messages are fetched automatically (localhost detected). For production, use a public URL.
channels.webhookUrlNotUsed: Webhook URL (not used in polling mode)
channels.webhookHelp: Set this URL as your bot's webhook in BotFather using /setwebhook
channels.accessControlEmpty: Anyone can message this bot. Add Telegram usernames or user IDs to restrict access.
channels.accessControlCount: Only {{count}} user(s) can access this bot.
channels.noRestrictions: No restrictions - anyone can use this bot
channels.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
channels.comingSoonDesc: Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, and more messaging platforms will be available in future updates.
billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and update your plan.
billing.lifetimeAccess: You have Special Lifetime Access - Since you came first
billing.scheduledChange: Your plan will change to {{tier}} on {{date}}
billing.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You will retain access until the end of your billing period.
billing.cancelSuccess: Subscription cancelled. You will retain access until the end of your billing period.
apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Manage your secret keys for authentication and integration.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.howToUse: How to use your API Key
apiKeys.createAgentDesc: Navigate to the Agents section to create an agent for your specific workflow.
apiKeys.deployAgentDesc: Deploy the created agent to make it accessible and ready for requests.
apiKeys.accessDocsDesc: Access the API documentation for that deployed agent, where you will find the necessary curl code to utilize your API key.
apiKeys.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional description of this key's usage...
apiKeys.permissionsHint: Select at least one permission scope.
apiKeys.copyWarning: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again!
apiKeys.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? This cannot be undone.
planChange.immediateUpgradeDesc: Your plan will be upgraded immediately. You'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of your billing period.
planChange.scheduledDowngradeDesc: Your plan will change at the end of your current billing period. You'll continue to have access to {{planName}} features until then.
planChange.downgradeWarning: After downgrading, you may lose access to some features and your usage limits will be reduced.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.shortVersionDesc: We collect only what's necessary to provide ClaraVerse services. Your data is encrypted, you can export it anytime, and you can delete everything with one click. We don't sell your data. Ever.
privacyPolicy.accountInfoDesc: User ID and email address provided by your authentication provider (Supabase). This is the minimum needed to identify your account.
privacyPolicy.uploadedFilesDesc: Images, PDFs, CSV, Excel, JSON, and other files you upload for AI processing
privacyPolicy.agentsWorkflowsDesc: Custom AI agents and workflows you build
privacyPolicy.credentialsDesc: Encrypted API keys for external providers you configure
privacyPolicy.usageDataDesc: Timestamps, model selections, and feature usage patterns. This helps us improve the service and debug issues.
privacyPolicy.useProvide: To provide and operate ClaraVerse services
privacyPolicy.useProcess: To process your requests through AI model providers
privacyPolicy.useSync: To sync your data across devices (when you enable cloud sync)
privacyPolicy.useAuth: To authenticate and secure your account
privacyPolicy.useImprove: To improve the service based on usage patterns
privacyPolicy.legalBasis: Legal Basis: Legitimate interest in providing the service (GDPR Article 6(1)(f))
privacyPolicy.tempFiles: Temporary Files - (PDF, Files Uploaded and Images)
privacyPolicy.localConv: Local Conversations - (There stored in your browser never accessible by claraverse)
privacyPolicy.cloudSync: Cloud-Synced Data - (If cross device sync is enabled)
privacyPolicy.auditLogs: Audit Logs - (Only Contains Timestamps, User ID, and Action Type)
privacyPolicy.rightsDesc: You have full control over your data:
privacyPolicy.rightAccessDesc: Download all your personal data at any time from Settings.
privacyPolicy.rightErasureDesc: Delete your account and all associated data permanently.
privacyPolicy.rightPortabilityDesc: Export your data in machine-readable JSON format.
privacyPolicy.dataShared: Data shared: User ID, email, auth tokens
privacyPolicy.aiProvidersDesc: Processing chat messages and generating responses
privacyPolicy.aiDataShared: Data shared: Messages and file content you send. Provider varies based on your selection (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.) (Note: TEE Provider never store data and they cannot access it as well)
privacyPolicy.securityItem1: AES-256-GCM encryption for sensitive data at rest
privacyPolicy.securityItem2: Bcrypt hashing for API key storage
privacyPolicy.securityItem3: JWT-based authentication with secure token handling
privacyPolicy.securityItem4: HTTPS encryption for all data in transit
privacyPolicy.securityItem6: Automatic data expiration for temporary files
privacyPolicy.cookiesDesc: We use minimal cookies for authentication purposes only. No tracking cookies, no third-party analytics, no advertising cookies.
privacyPolicy.changesDesc: We'll notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
privacyPolicy.contactDesc: Questions about this policy or want to exercise your rights?
privacyPolicy.footer: This policy is written in plain language because we believe privacy policies shouldn't require a law degree to understand.
settings.integrationCredentialsDesc: Securely manage API keys and webhooks for external integrations like Discord, Slack, GitHub, and more.
